queue.title: MECH-089 Theta Batching -- E3 noise reduced when sampling batched E1 updates
queue.description: Two conditions matched seeds: Condition A theta_buffer_size=4 (batched, E3 samples every 4 E1 steps) vs Condition B theta_buffer_size=1 (raw, every step). Measures e3_prediction_error variance. PASS: C1 e3_error_batched < e3_error_raw*0.90, C2 e1_per_e3_batched>=3, C3 harm_pred_std_batched>0.01, C4 harm_pred_std_raw>0.01, C5 no fatal errors.

queue.title: SD-005 Latent Information Separation -- adversarial GRL fine-tuning probe
queue.description: EXQ-047d FAIL (x2, identical): design failure -- no separation training objective. Both z_self and z_world carried equal action info (dissociation=0.008). Fix: Phase 2 adversarial fine-tuning -- gradient-reversal probe on z_world forces action info out of z_world while z_self retains it via motor-sensory loss. Unified condition cannot separate (z_self=z_world). Same probe criteria as 047d: C1 action_self > action_world + 0.10, C2 contact_world > contact_self + 0.10, C3/C4 split > unified + 0.05.

queue.title: MECH-098 Reafference Event Selectivity Pair -- ON vs OFF discriminative pair
queue.description: Discriminative pair: REAFFERENCE_ON (SD-007 enabled) vs REAFFERENCE_OFF (disabled), both alpha_world=0.9, seeds 42 and 7. Primary discriminator (pre-registered): event_selectivity_delta = margin(ON) - margin(OFF) where margin = mean(||delta_z_world|| on event steps) - mean(||delta_z_world|| on loco steps). PASS: C1 delta>=0.01 (MECH-098 core claim), C2 reafference_r2>0.20, C3 margin_OFF>0, C4 min event steps>=10. Decision: retain_ree/hybridize/retire_ree_claim. Addresses EXP-0001/EVB-0001 active_conflict deadline 2026-03-25.

queue.title: Q-021 Behavioral Flatness -- NoGo-only vs Competitive vs Random baseline
queue.description: Three conditions: NoGo-only (benefit_eval_enabled=False), Competitive (benefit_eval_enabled=True, ARC-030 Go channel), Random baseline. Environment: CausalGridWorldV2 use_proxy_fields=True. Tests Q-021: does pure-avoidance gradient produce quiescence (resource-visit rate <= random)? PASS (C1) nogo<=random+0.02, (C2) comp>=nogo+0.05, (C3) entropy gap>=0.10, (C4) nogo resource events<=comp*0.80.

queue.title: MECH-111 Novelty Signal -- E1 error EMA as exploration bonus
queue.description: Two conditions: NoveltyOFF (novelty_bonus_weight=0) vs NoveltyON (weight=0.1). E1 prediction error EMA fed back as trajectory scoring bonus. PASS: (C1) entropy gap>=0.10, (C2) novel cell coverage +3 cells, (C3) harm delta<=0.02, (C4) novelty_ema>0 at eval.

queue.title: MECH-112 Goal Attractor -- benefit_eval_head as prospective goal drive
queue.description: Two conditions: NoGoOnly (benefit_eval_enabled=False) vs GoNoGo (enabled, benefit_weight=1.0). Supervised from benefit_exposure (body_state[11], use_proxy_fields=True). PASS: (C1) resource_visit_rate gap>=0.05, (C2) benefit_eval_r2>0.10, (C3) pre_arrival benefit score gap>0.02, (C4) harm delta<=0.03.

queue.title: MECH-113 Self-Maintenance -- z_self D_eff homeostasis under perturbation
queue.description: Two conditions: NoMaintenance (weight=0) vs Maintenance (weight=0.1, D_eff target=1.5). Inject Gaussian noise (sigma=2.0) into z_self at eval start. D_eff=participation ratio from epistemic-mapping. PASS: (C1) maint D_eff ratio<=1.5x, (C2) nomaint D_eff ratio>=2.0x, (C3) gap>=0.5*nomaint_post, (C4) E2 loss not degraded.

completed.title: SD-005 Latent Information Separation Probe (design fix)
completed.description: SD-005: Latent Information Separation Probe (design fix). Round-robin action assignment + binary contact probe with balanced sampling + 500 probe steps. Fixes EXQ-047c flaws.

completed.title: ARC-007 Path Memory Ablation (Proper) -- residue field zeroing degrades hippocampal proposals
completed.description: Re-run of V3-EXQ-046b (infrastructure ERROR: SIGTERM during print, not a script bug). Prerequisite: EXQ-042 PASS. Tests ARC-007 STRICT (Q-020): hippocampal proposals are value-flat, relying entirely on residue field geometry. Protocol: P1 train (600 eps), P2 eval intact, P3 ablate (zero residue field via monkeypatch), P4 eval ablated, P5 restore, P6 eval restored. PASS: C1 hippo_quality_gap_intact>0, C2 ablated<=intact*0.5, C3 restored>=ablated, C4 cal_gap_approach>0.03, C5 no errors.

completed.title: Daniel-PC Batch GPU Speedup Calibration -- crossover batch size for world_forward kernel
completed.description: Infrastructure diagnostic. Sweeps batch_size [1,4,8,16,32,64,128,256,512], measures world_forward + backprop throughput (samples/sec) on CPU and GPU. Identifies crossover batch size at which Daniel-PC RTX 2060 Super beats CPU. Onboarding smoke showed GPU 3x slower at batch=1. Result feeds smart_assign() routing and informs EXQ-071+ replay-heavy experiments. Writes preferred_batch_mode to Daniel-PC.json. PASS: all cells complete without exception, n_transitions >= 4000.

completed.title: SD-003 Rollout-Batched Attribution -- batched world_forward preserves selectivity (3 distractor levels)
completed.description: Validates that batch-vectorized counterfactual rollouts (world_forward([n_cf,d]) in one call) give equivalent attribution to EXQ-030b sequential rollouts. Trains 150 eps (Fix 2: E3 on observed + E2-predicted states). Eval: paired sequential vs batched attribution at each step, rank_corr computed. Sweeps 3 distractor levels (n_hazards=2,4,6). PASS: C1 batch attribution_gap>0, C2 rank_corr>0.90 all levels, C3 batch sig_approach>0.005, C4 wf_r2>0.05, C5 n_approach>=20/level. Depends on EXQ-070 (GPU crossover confirmed before routing).
